JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON AUG-31-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

#1 MASON/NORMAN: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER ATTY L GRUNER ON PHONE FROM SACRAMENTO, THOUGHT TRIAL WAS ON 8-24-95. BOTH PARTIES STIP TO CONTINUE TRIAL. DEFT WAIVES JURY. BOTH SIDES WAIVE NOTICE.
#1 BENSON/BAUER: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY L GRUNER. DEFT J NUTTALL PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUTTALL, JOAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES NO LONGER AT ISSUE $2,943.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,623.00, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
